name: Jyske Invest Favorit Aktier KL
summary: Jyske Invest Favorit Aktier is an open ended equity mutual fund launched and managed by Jyske Invest Fund Management A/S. It invests in the public equity markets across the globe, primarily the United States. The fund makes its investments in stocks of companies operating across diversified sectors. Jyske Invest Favorit Aktier is domiciled in Denmark.
